export default function About() { return ( <>

About The Arise '20 Foundation

We exist to strengthen communities through service, compassion, and shared action.

Our Story

Founded with the belief that every individual can contribute to collective transformation, the foundation has grown from small acts of kindness into a trusted platform for relief and development.

Vision & Mission

Vision: A compassionate and empowered community where no one is left behind.

Mission: Deliver practical support and community-led programs that restore dignity and hope.

Integrity

Transparent actions and honest communication guide every decision.

Service

We put community needs first and act with consistency and care.

Compassion

Every program is shaped with empathy and human dignity at the center.

); }
